_doc: Browser discovery paths used by tt_download.py:find_chrome(). Listed here so users / agents can audit or extend without editing Python. Order = priority order. If a path matches and the file exists, it wins over later entries. PATH-lookup fallback runs AFTER all explicit paths, checking the names in PATH_FALLBACK.

win32._doc: Built dynamically from ProgramFiles / ProgramFiles(x86) / ProgramW6432 env vars at runtime. The static list below is the set of relative paths probed under each of those roots.

engine_note: All browsers must be Chromium-based for --headless=new --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget to work. Firefox / Safari are NOT supported.

min_version._doc: 109 is when --headless=new became the recommended mode. Older Chrome used --headless (legacy mode) which lacks full DOM/CSS rendering and will miss the JS-rendered <video> tag.

diy._doc: To add a custom browser location: set the CHROME_CANDIDATES list in scripts/tt_download.py, OR set the TT_DOWNLOAD_CHROME env var (not yet implemented; raise an issue if you need it).
